title: Argentinian Beef Yakitori
description: A Japanese twist on traditional grilled beef skewers, using Argentinian beef and a sweet soy sauce glaze.
instructions: 2. Cut Argentinian beef into 1-inch pieces and thread onto skewers.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, and brown sugar.
4. Brush the mixture onto both sides of the beef skewers.
5. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, or until cooked to desired level of doneness.
6. While the beef is cooking, toast the sesame seeds in a dry skillet over medium heat.
7. Once the beef is cooked, brush with additional soy sauce mixture and sprinkle with toasted sesame seeds.
8. Garnish with grilled scallions and serve immediately.
